result.caveats: OpenStreetMap data is crowd sourced and cannot be considered to be exhaustive
result.name: hotosm_irq_health_facilities
result.notes:
This theme includes all OpenStreetMap features in this area matching ( Learn what tags means [here](https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Tags) ) :

tags['healthcare'] IS NOT NULL OR tags['amenity'] IN ('doctors', 'dentist', 'clinic', 'hospital', 'pharmacy')

Features may have these attributes:

- [name](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:name)
- [name:en](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:name:en)
- [amenity](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:amenity)
- [building](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:building)
- [healthcare](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:healthcare)
- [healthcare:speciality](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:healthcare:speciality)
- [operator:type](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:operator:type)
- [capacity:persons](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:capacity:persons)
- [addr:full](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:addr:full)
- [addr:city](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:addr:city)
- [source](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:source)
- [name:ar](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:name:ar)
- [name:ku](http://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:name:ku)

This dataset is one of many [OpenStreetMap exports on
HDX](https://data.humdata.org/organization/hot).
See the [Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team](http://hotosm.org/) website for more
information.

organization.name: hot
organization.title: Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT)
organization.description:
**For up-to-the-minute exports from OpenStreetMap in a variety of formats for GPS and GIS, visit http://export.hotosm.org**

Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT) acts as a bridge between the traditional humanitarian responders and the OpenStreetMap Community. HOT works both remotely and physically in countries to assist the collection of geographic data, usage of that information and training others in OpenStreetMap.

result.title: Iraq Health Facilities (OpenStreetMap Export)
